author: cms-sw
body: Update `xz` to latest version `5.8.3`. As this rebuild nearly all the externals (due to rebuild of `python3`) so I also propose to update the build configuration of externals to use `CMAKE_BUILD_TYPE=%{cmake_build_type}` which will allow us to configure and build a package in debug mode using `cmsBuild --define cms_debug_packages=pkg1,pkg2`
title: Update xz version 5.8.3 and allow to build pkgs in debug mode
